name: deepwiki-index
description: Index a public GitHub repo's DeepWiki (the 'Ask DeepWiki' badge target) hands-free and autonomously — no human clicking. Encodes the verified deepwiki.com trigger (api.devin.ai/ada/index_public_repo, reCAPTCHA v2-invisible) plus the trusted-browser path (drive the real desktop via screen-mcp, or the bundled Playwright helper with a real Chrome profile) so the captcha passes silently, then polls the public status API to completed.
